                def format_telegram(alert, price_data, ai_analysis = nil)
          
      44. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    44. 
            

            

                  emoji = EMOJIS[alert.alert_type] || "\u{1F514}" # bell
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

                  label = ALERT_TYPE_LABELS[alert.alert_type] || alert.alert_type
          
      46. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    46. 
            

            

                  symbol = alert.symbol
          
      47. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    47. 
            

            

                  price = price_data[:close] || price_data[:price]
          
      48. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    48. 
            

            

                  change_pct = price_data[:change_percent]
          
      49. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    49. 
            

            

            
          
      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50. 
            

            

                  lines = []
          
      51. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    51. 
            

            

                  lines << "#{emoji} *#{esc(label)}*"
          
      52. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    52. 
            

            

                  lines << ""
          
      53. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    53. 
            

            

                  lines << "\u{1F4B9} *#{esc(symbol)}* \\| #{esc(company_name(alert))}"
          
      54. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    54. 
            

            

                  lines << "\u{1F4B0} Precio: *$#{esc(format_number(price))}*"
          
      55. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    55. 
            

            

                  lines << "\u{1F4CA} Cambio: #{esc(format_change(change_pct))}" if change_pct
          
      56. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    56. 
            

            

                  lines << ""
          
      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57. 
            

            

                  lines << "\u{26A0}\u{FE0F} _#{esc(trigger_description(alert, price_data))}_"
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            

            

            
          
      59. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    59. 
            

            

                  if ai_analysis.present? && !ai_analysis[:error]
          
      60. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    60. 
            

            

                    lines << ""
          
      61. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    61. 
            

            

                    lines << "\u{1F916} *Análisis IA:*"
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

                    lines << esc(ai_analysis[:summary] || ai_analysis[:recommendation] || "Sin análisis disponible")
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63.

    156.

                  when "rsi_overbought"
          
      161.

    170.

    174.

      177.

                def flush_window(symbol, window)
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            

            

                  return if window[:trade_count].zero?
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103. 
            

            

            
          
      104. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    104. 
            

            

                  vwap = window[:vwap_denominator] > 0 ? (window[:vwap_numerator] / window[:vwap_denominator]).round(4) : window[:close]
          
      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

            
          
      106. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    106. 
            

            

                  previous_close = @previous_closes[symbol]
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107. 
            

            

                  change = previous_close ? (window[:close] - previous_close).round(4) : nil
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                  change_percent = previous_close && previous_close > 0 ? ((change / previous_close) * 100).round(4) : nil
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

            
          
      110. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    110. 
            

            

                  @previous_closes[symbol] = window[:close]

    115.

    116.

    117.

    118.

    119. 
            

            

                    change_percent: change_percent,

    120.

    122. 
            

            

                    trade_count: window[:trade_count],
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            

            

                    timestamp: window[:window_start].iso8601,
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            

            

                    source: "websocket"
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

                  }
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            

            
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            

            

                  broadcast(symbol, payload)
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128.

                  evaluate_alerts(symbol, payload)

    131. 
            

            

                rescue StandardError => e
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            

                  Rails.logger.error("[TradeAggregator] Flush error for #{symbol}: #{e.message}")
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            

            

                end
